summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MAGNA premium microsite - all core features working correctly

Navigation menu with all sections (Manifesto, Products, Specs, Gallery, Contact)
Language selector ES/PT functionality with bidirectional switching
Products section showing MAGNA 1200 and MAGNA 900
Contact form integration with backend API
Mobile responsive design and mobile menu
Toast notifications for form submission feedback
